zh.Brenchley, Kent, England, Kingdom of Eng: 英國英格蘭肯特布藍利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Downer於1474年1月10日出生在英國肯特布藍利時，她的父親Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley28歲，母親Agnes Burr28歲。她於1499年與Sir William Willard在英國肯特布藍利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年1月11日在她的家鄉享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Downer于1474年1月10日出生在英国肯特布藍利时，她的父亲Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley28岁，母亲Agnes Burr28岁。她于1499年与Sir William Willard在英国肯特布藍利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1510年1月11日在她的家乡享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Downer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Isle of Wight, Hampshire, and Sussex): topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or down, from Middle English douner, a derivative of Middle English doun (Old English dūn) ‘hill’ + -er. It is synonymous with atte Doune (see Down ) and is a type of formation especially common in Sussex, Surrey, and Hampshire.

English: in the north-West Midlands perhaps a variant of Downward with shortening of the final syllable to -er, a habitational name probably from Downwood (Herefordshire) and perhaps also Dunwood (Staffordshire), with -wood re-etymologized as -ward and occasionally shortened to -ard. See also Downard .

variants.name: Dunman
meanings: English: variant of Downman, a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) down’; compare Downer . Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a late variant of Downham .

variants.name: Down
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a down or low hill, from Middle English dun(e), doun(e) (Old English dūn) ‘down, low hill’. See also Downer .

English (Devon): possibly in some cases a patronymic from the Old English personal name Dūn, but later names of this origin cannot reliably be distinguished from those originating from the topographic sense. See Dunn 2.

variants.name: Downard
meanings: English: variant of Downer , with excrescent -d. Downard was re-etymologized as Downeherd and Downward, and perhaps also as Dunwood.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

variants.name: Joannah

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Downer was born on 10 January 1474, in Brenchley, Kent, England, her father, Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley, was 28 and her mother, Agnes Burr, was 28. She married Sir William Willard in 1499, in Brenchley, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 11 January 1510, in her hometown, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Downer est née le 10 janvier 1474, à Brenchley, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes Burr, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Willard en 1499, à Brenchley, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 11 janvier 1510, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna Downer am 10. Januar 1474 in Brenchley, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley 28 und ihre Mutter Agnes Burr 28. Sie hat 1499 in Brenchley, Kent, England Sir William Willard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 11. Januar 1510 im Alter von 36 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Downer è nata il il 10 gennaio 1474 nel Brenchley, Kent, England, sua padre, Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Agnes Burr, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Willard nel 1499, nel Brenchley, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 gennaio 1510, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Downerが1474年1月10日にイギリスケントブレンチリーで生まれた時，父Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchleyは28歳，母Agnes Burrは28歳であった。1499年にイギリスケントブレンチリーでSir William Willardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1510年1月11日に故郷で36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Downer(이)가 1474년 1월 10일 영국 켄트 브렌클리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Burr(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1499년 영국 켄트 브렌클리에서 Sir William Willard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 1월 11일 그녀의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.10 January 1474–11 January 1510: 10 de janeiro de 1474–11 de janeiro de 1510
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Downer nasceu em 10 de janeiro de 1474, em Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Burr, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Willard em 1499, em Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 11 de janeiro de 1510, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Downer родилась 10 января 1474 г. в местности бренчли, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Burr, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Willard в 1499 г. в местности бренчли, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 января 1510 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 36 лет.

es.10 January 1474–11 January 1510: 10 de enero de 1474–11 de enero de 1510
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Downer nació el 10 de enero de 1474, en Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Agnes Burr, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir William Willard en 1499, en Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de enero de 1510, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años.
